title: After the Kikuka Sho: A Father's Blessing

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Hm? We're on the home stretch. I should be
getting tired right about now...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But my legs... they feel fiiire! I think I can actually
do this! Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it! I did iiiiit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm the Kikuka Sho Champion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what happened, though. I was pretty sure
3,000 meters was gonna be too tough for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Palmer... Congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen. Thanks. Uh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm pretty surprised about it myself. I
didn't think I'd be able to run 3,000 meters so
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It appears you have trained quite a lot over the
summer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I presume you used different training methods as
well? The way you move your lower body is
markedly changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Different training... over the summer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I get it now. Being outside the whole time and
constantly running up and down steep slopes
must've made me stronger....)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'll accept this defeat... for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goal is the spring Tenno Sho. This isn't the
end. I still have time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniffle... Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is nothing for you to feel guilty about. This
is because of my lack of virtue. The weakness of
my will. My lack of power.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I just... wanted to... win here... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, McQueen... I can't believe she wanted to win
that badly...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I won today. I ran as hard as I could, of course,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Did I really wanna win so bad that I would've
cried if I didn't? I wonder...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, there's an interview for the winner.

text_block_list.name: Newspaper Reporter
text_block_list.text: Hello, I'm with Racer Times ! You ran wonderfully today, Mejiro Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Newspaper Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Is there anyone out there you'd like to thank right
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: U-uh, well... First of all...

text_block_list.name: Newspaper Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It's got to be your old man, right? He must be
first on the list!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me? I mean... I guess...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, Dad?! You're here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is my dad. He's a reporter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't what the heck he's thinking interviewing
his own daughter, but here we are.

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Father
text_block_list.text: Nice to meet ya, Trainer. Come to think of it...

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Father
text_block_list.text:
Well, to tell the truth, Palmer's hardly told me a
thing about you.

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Father
text_block_list.text:
She's usually pretty forthcoming with me, so I
found it pretty suspicious that she wouldn't share
anything with her old man...

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Father
text_block_list.text: So... give me the lowdown. How's she doing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Cut it out! You sound like some kinda
tabloid writer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The interview ends up friendly and energetic, with
a lot of back and forth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I won today, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I really am built a little different than the other
Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like... I feel like I don't have the same passion for
racing. Or the same strength to dream big.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ryan ran all of the Classic Triple Crown races with
a sense of duty to win every single one of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And McQueen's attitude toward the race today
was really amazing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then there's me. All I was thinking about was
having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me if I was taking the race as seriously
as them, well... I can't really say I was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I like running, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I don't know where exactly I should be running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyway, that just popped into my head! It's not
like I'm seriously worried about where I belong or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's enough of that! Oh, right, you gonna eat
that spicy pudding in the fridge? I've gotten
kinda addicted to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer changes the subject and heads for
the refrigerator. It seems she hasn't decided how
she feels yet.
